title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Fire-Boltt - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Fire-Boltt! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Fire-Boltt:
Fire-Boltt is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fire-Boltt!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
